metadata.description: AI team orchestration plugin for Claude Code — Hal delegates all work to specialized subagents and never does the work directly.

plugins.name: hal2026
plugins.description: AI team orchestration plugin. Hal receives requests, assesses which specialist is best suited, and delegates via subagent. Includes a hiring pipeline (Rachel researches, Holly creates agents), a full development pipeline (Spec → Plan → Build → Review → Test → Ship), and a .claudeignore hook system for file-level access control.
